headline: Music Theory Basics
description: Music theory describes how music works. Fundamentals: pitch (frequency), rhythm (time), melody (pitch sequence), harmony (simultaneous pitches), timbre (tone quality). Western 12-tone equal temperament divides octave into 12 semitones. Scales: major (happy), minor (sad), pentatonic, chromatic. Chords: triads (3 notes), seventh chords (4 notes).
